title: Durable shared-demo profile and safe reset
scope: Added NOTARY_STORAGE_PROFILE=shared_demo for local JSON-backed demo persistence.
Added NOTARY_SHARED_DEMO_STORAGE_PATH to control the shared-demo state file.
Preserved default in-memory behavior for local development and tests.
Added reset support that clears shared-demo state and restarts deterministic incident IDs.
Kept this profile separate from AWS Postgres/S3/Object Lock claims.
acceptance: Demo incidents and Release Gate domain objects survive process restart when shared_demo profile is enabled.
Safe reset clears the local shared-demo profile without touching cloud resources.
Reseeding after reset starts from deterministic local IDs.
The profile can be validated without AWS or Cloudflare credentials.
